articles.summary: The voice layer 100,000+ developers use daily just launched on Android. Now it's on every platform.

articles.title: ANTHROPIC UPDATES CLAUDE COWORK TOOL BUILT TO GIVE THE AVERAGE OFFICE WORKER A PRODUCTIVITY BOOST
articles.summary: Anthropic's Claude Cowork is getting a wider release. Anthropic launched a series of connectors and plugins for the knowledge worker tool earlier this week aimed at 'turbo-charging' the capabilities of individual employees. The update marks the tool's transition into a true enterprise-grade product. Organizations can now connect Claude Cowork to tools like Google Drive, Gmail, DocuSign, and FactSet. They can also deploy customizable plugins that encode institutional knowledge and workflows.

articles.title: ANTHROPIC DIALS BACK AI SAFETY COMMITMENTS
articles.summary: Anthropic is softening its core safety policy to stay competitive with other AI labs. The company previously paused development work on its model if it could be classified as dangerous, but it will end that practice if a comparable or superior model is released by a competitor. Anthropic faces intense competition with rivals that regularly release cutting-edge tools. The change in policy is unrelated to Anthropic's battle with the Defense Department over how its Claude tools should be used.

articles.title: KILO LAUNCHES KILOCLAW, ALLOWING ANYONE TO DEPLOY OPENCLAW AGENTS IN PRODUCTION IN 60 SECONDS
articles.summary: KiloClaw enables users to deploy OpenClaw agents in under 60 seconds without dealing with complex infrastructure setup. The service runs on Fly.io's multi-tenant VMs, offering robust security and persistent "always-on" capabilities with built-in monitoring. It integrates with the Kilo Gateway, offering access to over 500 models, and includes an innovative benchmarking tool, PinchBench, to optimize model selection for real-world tasks.

articles.title: INTELLIGENCE YIELD
articles.summary: Everyone focuses on how hard a task can models solve. Benchmark data also captures how much work models need to get there. Opus 4.6 solves harder tasks, more reliably, with considerably less compute. The post contains charts comparing models from Anthropic, OpenAI, and Google.

articles.title: AGENTS ARE NOT THINKING, THEY ARE SEARCHING 🔗
CITRINI'S SCENARIO IS A GREAT BUT DEEPLY FLAWED THOUGHT EXPERIMENT
articles.summary: A recent viral essay about how AI's bullishness could be bearish is full of flaws and just a work of speculative fiction. It posits that AI's success will be bad for the economy rather than good. However, the reality is that the technology will create more opportunity in the market rather than destroy it. There may be transitional pains, but there probably won't be any unsolvable problems.

articles.title: THE 5-STEP PLAYBOOK FOR FINDING THE VALUE OF AI
articles.summary: We love this practical guide from You.com [11] that walks through a proven framework to identify, prioritize, and document high-value AI opportunities. Explore where AI can drive the most impact in your organization, both internally and externally. Learn more with this AI Use Case Discovery Guide [11].

articles.title: QWEN3.5-35B-A3B (HUGGING FACE REPO)
articles.summary: Qwen3.5 integrates breakthroughs in multimodal learning, architectural efficiency, reinforcement learning scale, and global accessibility to deliver exceptional utility and performance. It features a unified vision-language foundation, an efficient hybrid architecture, scalable RL generalization, global linguisting coverage, and next-generation training infrastructure. Qwen3.5 natively supports context lengths of up to 262,144 tokens. This repository contains model weights and configuration files for the post-trained model in the Hugging Face Transformers format.

articles.title: SECURITY BOUNDARIES IN AGENTIC ARCHITECTURES
articles.summary: Agentic systems risk security breaches when agents execute generated code without proper boundaries. These systems should separate agent compute from generated code to prevent access to sensitive secrets. Combining isolated sandboxes with secret injection proxies enhances security by preventing credential theft or misuse during execution.

articles.title: VERY BIG VIDEO REASONING DATASET AND BENCHMARK
articles.summary: The VBVR suite introduced over one million video clips across 200 structured reasoning tasks to support large-scale research in video reasoning. It also included VBVR-Bench, a rule-based and human-aligned evaluation framework designed for reproducible assessment and scaling studies.

articles.title: HEAD OF AMAZON'S AGI LAB IS LEAVING THE COMPANY
articles.summary: David Luan, head of Amazon's AGI lab, is leaving the company after less than two years. He was hired through an acqui-hire of his startup, Adept, leading efforts like the Nova frontier model to compete with major AI models. His departure follows a reorganization of Amazon's AGI division under cloud unit executive Peter DeSantis.

articles.title: META AND AMD PARTNER FOR LONGTERM AI INFRASTRUCTURE AGREEMENT
articles.summary: Meta has partnered with AMD in a multi-year agreement to enhance AI infrastructure with up to 6GW of AMD Instinct GPUs. This collaboration focuses on vertical integration across silicon, systems, and software, aligning roadmaps for scalable AI deployments. Shipments for the first GPU deployments will begin in late 2026, leveraging AMD's Helios rack-scale architecture for enhanced compute power.

articles.title: BUILD THE AGENTIC ENTERPRISE AT SALESFORCE TDX
articles.summary: Be at the forefront of the largest technological shift in decades. Join Salesforce's Developer Conference (San Francisco, April 15–16) for deep technical training, hackathons, and more. Save $600 with

articles.title: PRODUCERAI JOINS GOOGLE LABS
articles.summary: ProducerAI, a generative music platform for creating and refining tracks, is now part of Google Labs.

articles.title: OPENAI'S NEW CPO
articles.summary: OpenAI has appointed Arvind KC as Chief People Officer.

articles.title: BUILD DYNAMIC AGENTIC WORKFLOWS IN OPAL
articles.summary: Google has introduced agentic intelligence to Opal workflows, enhancing flexibility and interactivity.

articles.title: ANTHROPIC OFFERS STAFF $6B SHARE SALE AT STAGGERING $350B VALUATION
articles.summary: The transaction could total between $5 billion and $6 billion.

articles.title: WE ARE CHANGING OUR DEVELOPER PRODUCTIVITY EXPERIMENT DESIGN
articles.summary: METR is changing its Developer Productivity Experiment design as a significant number of developers are choosing not to participate in the study as they do not wish to work without AI.
